case_title: SPARACINO, NINA VS BLUE CROSS OF CA-DONNELLY, BRIAN GENERAL COUNSEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $740.00 FILED BY SPARACINO, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CA-DONNELLY, BRIAN GENERAL COUNSEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
